articles.description: A touchscreen MacBook Pro or top-of-the-line Mac Studio may not be coming your way soon.
articles.content: Highly anticipated upgrades to Apples Mac computer models are reportedly hitting delays caused by an ongoing memory shortage brought about by the proliferation of AI, according to Bloombergs Mark Gur… [+1079 chars]

articles.title: Leica Partners With Gpixel to Make Its Next-Generation Image Sensor - PetaPixel
articles.description: Leica is working with Gpixel on a custom image sensor for a next-generation Leica camera.
articles.content: Leica Camera AG and Gpixel, a leading global provider of CMOS image sensors, have announced a new strategic partnership. The two companies are working together to co-develop a new high-performance im… [+4394 chars]

articles.title: [TUY8S1.1] Cherry Blossom Event, Creator Collaboration & Updates - Ubisoft
articles.description: Cherry blossoms are falling across D.C., and something new has come with them. A Creator Collaboration with Otsuichi, Rezina, and Mobilmobil adds its own activities and rewards to the update.
